final:
// // This is a 3-bit shift register that captures the input data 'd' on the falling edge of the clock signal 'clk'. The module shifts the stored data right by one position with each clock cycle, moving the most significant bit (MSB) of the register to the output 'q'. The output always reflects the oldest bit that was shifted out of the register.
module top_module(input clk, input d, output q);reg [2:0] reg_data; // 3-bit shift register

  always @(posedge clk) begin
    reg_data <= {reg_data[1:0], d}; // shift data on each clock cycle
  end

  assign q = reg_data[0]; // output of the last flip-flop

endmodule
